title: YTPMV: Yes Man
description:
Surprisingly, not part of the MM9 collab.

But yeah, this was mainly an experiment to try out manipulating videos with Vegas. As is I'm finding it's got more limitations than I'd like. I'm wondering how everyone else is getting so much else out of it...
I'll also admit I couldn't think of anything good to put in during the break in the main track, so I left it blank. Meh, I dunno...I kinda like it as is though.

EDIT: Oh wow, 10,000 views. Nice.
